name: prediction-mcp
title: Prediction Markets
description: Unified prediction market data from Polymarket and Kalshi — search, prices, orderbooks, relevance-scored results
author: shaanmajid
tagline: Polymarket and Kalshi prediction data in one place

highlights.text: Polymarket — search events, prices, orderbooks, no auth needed
Kalshi — markets, positions, balance, and trading
Relevance scoring — results ranked by query relevance
Orderbooks — live bid/ask depth for any market
Zero-config Polymarket — no API key required for read-only access

readme:
### What it does

Prediction Markets aggregates data from Polymarket and Kalshi into a single MCP. Search for prediction markets on any topic, check current prices and probability estimates, browse orderbooks, and — with Kalshi credentials — view positions and place trades.

Polymarket access is completely free and requires no authentication. Kalshi features unlock progressively with API credentials.

### Two-tier access

- **Polymarket (no auth)** — search events, get market prices, browse orderbooks. Works out of the box.
- **Kalshi (API key + RSA key)** — search markets, view balance and positions, place orders. Requires Kalshi account and API credentials.

### Safety note

Polymarket tools are read-only. However, the Kalshi `kalshi_create_order` tool can place real-money trades and currently lacks a confirm gate. Exercise caution with Kalshi credentials enabled — consider using Kalshi’s demo environment for testing.

### Relevance scoring

Search results are ranked by relevance to your query rather than by volume or recency, making it easier to find niche markets on specific topics.

scenarios.label: Research prediction market consensus
scenarios.body: Search Polymarket for events related to a topic, compare current prices across related markets, and summarise the implied probability distribution.

scenarios.label: Monitor a specific market
scenarios.body: Look up a Polymarket or Kalshi market by topic, check current bid/ask prices and orderbook depth, and assess liquidity before acting.

scenarios.label: Review Kalshi portfolio positions
scenarios.body: Check Kalshi account balance, list open positions with current market prices, and evaluate unrealised P&L across active contracts.

env.name: KALSHI_API_KEY
env.description: Kalshi API key ID (optional — enables Kalshi auth tools)

env.name: KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
env.description: Path to Kalshi RSA private key PEM (optional)

env.name: KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM
env.description: Kalshi RSA key as inline PEM string (alternative to path)

setup.blurb: Prediction market data from Polymarket and Kalshi. Read-only for Polymarket, trading with Kalshi API key.

fields.label: Kalshi API Key
fields.help: From kalshi.com Settings > API Keys. Only needed for Kalshi balance/positions/trading.

fields.label: Kalshi Private Key Path
fields.help: RSA private key matching your Kalshi API key

certification.security_notes: Polymarket tools are read-only (no auth). Kalshi kalshi_create_order tool lacks confirm gate — real-money risk. Auth tools conditionally registered based on credential presence.
